const BASE_URL='/api/clients';const clientsApi={// Get all clients
async getClients(){const response=await fetch(BASE_URL);if(!response.ok){throw new Error("Failed to fetch clients: ".concat(response.statusText));}return response.json();},// Get a specific client by ID
async getClient(id){const response=await fetch("".concat(BASE_URL,"/").concat(id));if(!response.ok){throw new Error("Failed to fetch client: ".concat(response.statusText));}return response.json();},// Create a new client
async createClient(clientData){const response=await fetch(BASE_URL,{method:'POST',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(clientData)});if(!response.ok){const errorData=await response.json().catch(()=>({}));throw new Error(errorData.error||"Failed to create client: ".concat(response.statusText));}return response.json();},// Update a client
async updateClient(id,clientData){const response=await fetch("".concat(BASE_URL,"/").concat(id),{method:'PUT',headers:{'Content-Type':'application/json'},body:JSON.stringify(clientData)});if(!response.ok){const errorData=await response.json().catch(()=>({}));throw new Error(errorData.error||"Failed to update client: ".concat(response.statusText));}return response.json();},// Delete a client
async deleteClient(id){const response=await fetch("".concat(BASE_URL,"/").concat(id),{method:'DELETE'});if(!response.ok){const errorData=await response.json().catch(()=>({}));throw new Error(errorData.error||"Failed to delete client: ".concat(response.statusText));}return response.json();},// Get client statistics
async getClientStats(id){const response=await fetch("".concat(BASE_URL,"/").concat(id,"/stats"));if(!response.ok){throw new Error("Failed to fetch client stats: ".concat(response.statusText));}return response.json();}};export default clientsApi;
